case_title: GENRIETA YEVDAYEVA et al VS. MIRIAM KORPI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEVA, GENRIETA YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN AS TO DEFENDANT KORPI, MIRIAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN SERVED JUL-07-2003, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEVA, GENRIETA YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KORPI, MIRIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2032 KIRKHAM ST. (LOWER UNIT), S.F. CA. 94122, INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $29.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT KORPI, MIRIAM
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY WITH FURTHER COST OF 85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT KORPI, MIRIAM
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEVDAYEV, RAKHMAN
